sources.title: The Vanishing Shadow (1934) 12-CHAPTER CLIFFHANGER
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Marathon Edition! Complete 12-Chapter Cliffhanger!
Starring: Onslow Stevens, James Durkin, Ada Ince
Directed by: Lew Landers

An electrical engineer teams up with a fellow scientist to avenge his father’s death at the hands of corrupt, money-making politicians. On their crusade, they develop a variety of complex devices—ray guns, Robots, and a Vanishing Belt that leaves only the user’s shadow visible. But the arrival of a beautiful reporter complicates their plans. 

🍕CHAPTERS🍕
0:00       PizzaFLIX Introduction
1:27       CHAPTER 1:  Accused of Murder 
22:28     CHAPTER 2:  The Destroying Ray
42:46     CHAPTER 3:  The Avalanche
1:03:25  CHAPTER 4:  Trapped
1:23:41  CHAPTER 5:  Hurled from the Sky
1:42:17  CHAPTER 6:  Chain Lightning
2:03:03  CHAPTER 7:  The Tragic Crash
2:22:57  CHAPTER 8:  The Shadow of Death
2:42:47  CHAPTER 9:  Blazing Bulkheads 
3:03:47  CHAPTER 10:  The Iron Death
3:23:32  CHAPTER 11:  The Juggernaut
3:42:18  CHAPTER 13:  Retribution
4:02:48 Please Subscribe!

sources.title: The Vanishing Shadow 1934 colorized cliffhanger serial
sources.description: A young engineer (Onslow Stevens) and a professor (James Durkin) use a variety of amazing inventions (an invisibility vest, a ray gun and a robot) to fight back against the greedy businessman (Walter Miller) and his henchman (Richard Cramer) who hounded his father to death. These bad guys aren't after his inventions, but are simply trying to get their hands on the valuable shares of stock in the Tribune that he inherited. The inventor is helped by the businessman's daughter (Ada Ince), who has disavowed him. A 12-chapter science fiction cliffhanger serial I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

metadata.Plot: A 12-episode serial in which a son avenges the death of his father at the hands of corrupt politicians. He develops a wide variety of complex devices in his crusade . . . ray guns, robots and a 'vanishing belt.'
metadata.Writer: Basil Dickey, George Morgan, Ella O'Neill
metadata.Actors: Onslow Stevens, Ada Ince, Walter Miller
